chunks.title: Jonathan's Victory
chunks.reason: Describes Jonathan's surprise attack on the Philistine garrison and the resulting confusion in their camp.

chunks.title: The Oath and the Honey
chunks.reason: Details Saul's rash oath, Jonathan's tasting of honey, and the people eating meat with blood.

chunks.title: Saul's Oath on Jonathan
chunks.reason: Narrates Saul seeking God's will, casting lots to find the sinner, and the people saving Jonathan.

chunks.title: Saul's Reign Summary
chunks.reason: Summarizes Saul's military campaigns, family members, and his method of recruiting soldiers.
